title: Dallas Cowboys eye trade with Pittsburgh Steelers for veteran linebacker
description: The Dallas Cowboys are reportedly exploring trade options with the Pittsburgh Steelers as they search for help at linebacker. After missing several free agent targets, Dallas is considering a deal for a two-time Pro Bowl defender entering the final year of his contract to strengthen its defense.

Iran's parliament speaker indicated no ceasefire is sought, emphasizing retaliation against aggressors.  Global oil prices have surged due to the conflict.

While the Board confirmed the papers are genuine and security remains intact, they are investigating the incident to prevent future occurrences. This unusual prank caused significant student and parent anxiety.

title: Anthropic takes US govt to court; CFO says: After President Trump’s social media posts, a major ...
description: Anthropic CEO apologized for a memo after talks with the Pentagon broke down, only to file a lawsuit against the Trump administration days later. The company seeks to overturn a national security threat designation, claiming it jeopardizes billions in revenue and irreparably harms its business and investor confidence.

title: 'Dream is to play senior World Cup': Yash Dhull opens up on heart surgery and comeback
description: Under-19 World Cup-winning captain Yash Dhull faced a challenging period after heart surgery, battling a strong desire to return to cricket.  Despite initial setbacks and a risky recovery, Dhull's focus remains on regaining fitness and aiming for a senior World Cup appearance, drawing inspiration from senior players and preparing for future opportunities.

title: 20-year-old finds unclaimed land, declares himself first Gen Z president
description: A 20-year-old, Daniel Jackson, claims to have founded the Free Republic of Verdis on a disputed strip along the Danube River between Croatia and Serbia. Arguing the land is terra nullius, he built an online micronation with citizens and passports. Croatian authorities removed him after a 2023 settlement attempt, leaving him running the project from exile in the United Kingdom.

title: Amazon sends complaint letter to FCC against Elon Musk's Starlink
description: Amazon's Project Kuiper has urged the FCC to reject SpaceX's proposal for a million-satellite constellation, citing a lack of essential technical and space safety details. Amazon argues the plan is speculative, would take centuries to deploy, and could monopolize orbital resources, hindering future space endeavors.
